description_long: This is a regional passenger airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted primarily white with blue accents on the tail and engine nacelles. The aircraft features a high-mounted straight wing configuration with two turboprop engines, each equipped with black propellers and blue tips. The tail section is painted blue and displays a prominent airline logo, while the vertical stabilizer is conventional in design. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with multiple windows for pilot visibility, and the passenger windows are evenly spaced along the sides. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it may be retractable. The overall design is streamlined for efficient flight, with clear demarcations for doors and emergency exits.
description: A white and blue regional passenger airplane with high-mounted straight wings, twin turboprop engines, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is elongated with multiple windows and a prominent airline logo on the tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, high-mounted wings, twin turboprop engines, and blue tail with airline logo.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, propellers, and the symmetrical high-wing configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, engines, and tail details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the blue tail section, vertical stabilizer, and the span of the high-mounted wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
